svg.aria-label: Research-based weekly digest cover: CVE-2025-55182 Next.js React2Shell exploit compromises 766 hosts stealing AWS keys and GitHub tokens, Cisco CVSS 9.8 critical IMC and SSM remote system compromise requiring immediate patch, AWS agentic AI four core security principles for least privilege isolation audit and human oversight
svg.title: Weekly digest 2026-04-03: CVE-2025-55182 React2Shell 766 hosts, Cisco CVSS 9.8 RCE patch, AWS Agentic AI 4 security principles

g.text: SSTI via SSR props - AWS keys, GitHub tokens, DB creds exfiltrated at scale
Integrated Management Controller and Smart Software Manager vulns
Least privilege, isolation, audit, human oversight
